title: Xi warns Biden against ‘playing with fire’ in Taiwan
description: The two leaders held the fifth conversation of their presidencies, speaking for over two hours amid tensions over Taiwan, trade | World News
keywords: china, taiwan, beijing, john kirby, washington, united states, mark milley, donald trump, nancy pelosi, xi jinping
snippet: President Joe Biden and Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping held "candid" phone talks on Thursday, with Xi warning the US leader not to "play with fire" on Taiwan, a...
